scope: web UI action ledger display hardening only
canon_basis: COMMAND_API.md strict JSON only, no plain-text/log fallback
DELIVERY_RULES.md runtime truth over narrative summaries
truth_rules: Action ledger status uses payload.status before nested result.status.
Command error is red and is never rendered as success.
Invalid JSON is a hard integration failure and is never rendered as success.
Timeout is a recoverable integration failure and is not rendered as success.
Post-action refresh failure converts the display state to stale for refresh-required ok action packets.
The action ledger is explicitly not a separate runtime truth source.

tests.coverage: ledger fields, state mapping, top-level status precedence, stale refresh handling, invalid JSON, timeout, and action-panel classes
executes overview.js in a Node VM with a DOM stub and proves command_error and invalid_json render red, while failed refresh renders stale amber

scope_risks.risk: Inspector observed existing overview/detail warning semantics where overall overview may remain healthy while detail warnings are appended.
scope_risks.disposition: Not changed in this contour because it is server/runtime truth semantics, not action ledger display. Keep for a separate canon-scoped contour if owner wants to reclassify overview warnings.

scope_risks.risk: Pre-existing dirty tail remains in runtime/external-agent files.
